zh.Tibenham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可提本哈姆
zh.Tibbenham,Norfolk,Eng: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可提本哈姆
zh.Spooner Row, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可斯波納 洛福
zh.of Tibenham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可提本哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fullman於1524年出生在英國諾福爾可提本哈姆時，她的父親John Fullman22歲，母親Elizabeth Speede21歲。她於1552年與Walter Anstye在英國諾福爾可斯波納 洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年在她的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fullman于1524年出生在英国諾福爾可提本哈姆时，她的父亲John Fullman22岁，母亲Elizabeth Speede21岁。她于1552年与Walter Anstye在英国諾福爾可斯波納 洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年在她的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Fullman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of North German Fullmann: variant of Vollmann (see Vollman ).
English: possibly a Middle English nickname from foul, ful ‘foul, dirty’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Vollman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Inge.
Americanized form of German Vollmann: variant of Volkmann .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fullman was born in 1524, in Tibenham, Norfolk, England, her father, John Fullman, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Speede, was 21. She married Walter Anstye in 1552, in Spooner Row, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died in 1571, in her hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fullman est née en 1524, à Tibenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Fullman, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Speede, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Anstye en 1552, à Spooner Row, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Fullman 1524 in Tibenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fullman 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Speede 21. Sie hat 1552 in Spooner Row, Norfolk, England Walter Anstye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1571 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fullman è nata il nel 1524 nel Tibenham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, John Fullman, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Speede, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Walter Anstye nel 1552, nel Spooner Row, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fullmanが1524年にイギリスノーフォルクティベンハムで生まれた時，父John Fullmanは22歳，母Elizabeth Speedeは21歳であった。1552年にイギリスノーフォルクスプオオンエル ローでWalter Anstyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1571年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fullman(이)가 1524년 영국 노르폴크 티벤함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fullman(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Speede(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1552년 영국 노르폴크 스포너 로에서 Walter Anstye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fullman nasceu em 1524, em Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fullman, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Speede, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Anstye em 1552, em Spooner Row, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1571, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fullman родилась в 1524 г. в местности тибенам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Fullman было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Speede, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Anstye в 1552 г. в местности спунир роу, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1571 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Fullman nació en 1524, en Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fullman, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Speede, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Walter Anstye en 1552, en Spooner Row, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en 1571, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
